title: Finding absolute values
description: Practice finding the absolute value of a number, like -4 or 3.

hints: [[☃ image 1]]
The distance from $0$ to $8.5$ is $8.5$, which equals the absolute value.
The distance from $0$ to $8.5$ is $8.5$, which equals the absolute value.
[[☃ image 1]]
The distance from $0$ to $-0.9$ is $0.9$, which equals the absolute value.
In other words, $0.9$ is the non-negative version of $-0.9$.
[[☃ image 1]]
The distance from $0$ to $-1$ is $1$, which equals the absolute value.
In other words, $1$ is the non-negative version of $-1$.
[[☃ image 1]]
The distance from $0$ to $3$ is $3$, which equals the absolute value.
[[☃ image 1]]
The distance from $0$ to $0$ is $0$, which equals the absolute value.
[[☃ image 1]]
The distance from $0$ to $-7.9$ is $7.9$, which equals the absolute value.
In other words, $7.9$ is the non-negative version of $-7.9$.
[[☃ image 1]]
The distance from $0$ to $-0.8$ is $0.8$, which equals the absolute value.
In other words, $0.8$ is the non-negative version of $-0.8$.
[[☃ image 1]]
The distance from $0$ to $9$ is $9$, which equals the absolute value.
[[☃ image 1]]
The distance from $0$ to $-6$ is $6$, which equals the absolute value.
In other words, $6$ is the non-negative version of $-6$.
[[☃ image 1]]
The distance from $0$ to $-0.4$ is $0.4$, which equals the absolute value.
In other words, $0.4$ is the non-negative version of $-0.4$.
[[☃ image 1]]
The distance from $0$ to $-5.6$ is $5.6$, which equals the absolute value.
In other words, $5.6$ is the non-negative version of $-5.6$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Select all numbers that have an absolute value of $4$.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The absolute value of a number is its distance from $0$.

We are looking for numbers that have a distance of $4$ from $0$.

$4$ has a distance of $4$ from $0$ in the positive direction.


[[☃ image 1]]

$-4$ has a distance of $4$ from $0$ in the negative direction.



[[☃ image 1]]
The numbers with an absolute value of $4$ are $4$ and $-4$.

The only number that has a distance of $0$ from $0$ is $0$.



[[☃ image 1]]
The number with an absolute value of $0$ is $0$.
